Arundo donax, also known as the giant reed or Arundarbor latifolia, is a tall, perennial grass native to the Mediterranean region. The health benefits of Arundo donax include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Arundo donax include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpene lactones, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Arundo donax include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, from indigestion to bronchitis.
